headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — use today to make meaningful progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), the sole active deliverable.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are live for tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures). You're flying blind on escalations and product metrics — unacceptable going into any leadership review.

quick_wins.task: Review the latest Agents Big Rock bi-weekly TR page for any action items assigned to you
quick_wins.why: The Confluence OKR page references evals as a key deliverable; confirm nothing new landed since the 3/18 review.

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations — clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: This is your only active Jira ticket, it's in To Do with no due date, and evals adoption is a key 26.4+ deliverable visible to leadership. Moving it to In Progress with a shareable draft today prevents it from becoming a blocker.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how the no-ground-truth evals design intersects with validation patterns and DeepRAG/BatchTransform work mentioned in OKRs
Get technical input on generated evaluation approaches without ground truth — needed to unblock AE-1079 design decisions

must_report_status.note: Proactively share status before the next Big Rock bi-weekly TR so there are no surprises.

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Treat as urgent ops fix.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and funnel metrics are completely dark.
AE-1079 has no due date set; risk of silent slippage on a leadership-visible evals deliverable. Set a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged 'Risk Yellow' in OKRs — monitor whether any evals work is a dependency for Autopilot de-risking.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting actions recorded yet today; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access would immediately recover visibility into customer escalations and adoption metrics.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage move to unblock the evals feature set critical to 26.4 goals.

slack_summary: Quiet day — no meetings, no emails, no Slack mentions. Top priority: make real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), the only active ticket and a leadership-visible 26.4 deliverable. Second: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake creds so you're not blind on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today — deep work day.
